dep.name: pypdf
dep.purpose: Fallback PDF compression when Ghostscript unavailable

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit checks: dependency detection, compression fallbacks, quality levels

wave-level.focus: End-to-end compression with real PDF samples when Ghostscript available

phase-level.focus: Full regression plus binary artifact verification

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer real Ghostscript when available; skip tests gracefully when absent.

Observability.redaction: Never log PDF content or file paths containing sensitive data.

DeliveryShape.shape: Standalone binary per platform, distributed via GitHub Releases. Also installable via Homebrew tap.
